tweets.content: Reels-Generator update: My automated posting workflow was broken, causing scheduled reels to stall. I tracked down the issue and fixed it in the GitHub workflow. Reels-Generator is back to posting engaging content on schedule. #ReelsGenerator

Added a new batch of 24 corrected video reels to the Reels-Generator project, including zodiac sign explanations and lucky month predictions. Each reel has been updated with fresh content and visuals.
tweets.sourceDetail: added new batch with corrected content

tweets.content: Added a new reel to Reels-Generator: name initials in English. Created 27 files, including JSON and MP4 formats, to enable seamless video generation. Users can now create personalized reels with their initials. #ReelsGenerator

Added new lucky month reels to Reels-Generator. Created 12 new files for different month ranges, each with a JSON and MP4 component. Now users can discover their lucky months in a more engaging way. #ReelsGenerator
tweets.sourceDetail: added new reels of lucky month

tweets.content: Automated astrological reels just got more diverse. I generated a second batch with more categories, including career, current events, emotional healing, and manifestation videos for each zodiac sign. #astrologyreels
tweets.sourceDetail: generated second batch of reels with more categories this time

tweets.content: Generated my first batch of zodiac reels with Reels-Generator. Started with 12 signs, each with its own JSON and MP4 file. Frame generator's working, and it's a huge step forward in automating video content for astrology enthusiasts. #ReelsGenerator
